# Fixture Radar

> Automated Premier League content planning dashboard. Ranks upcoming fixtures by an automated Content Score across rivalry, table stakes, star power, tentpole moments and form. Data auto-refreshes every 6 hours.

## Pages

- [This Week](/): Upcoming Premier League fixtures in the next 8 days, ranked by Content Score.
- [Season Radar](/radar): The 40 highest-scoring Premier League fixtures of the season, grouped by month.
- [Table](/table): Live Premier League standings with recent form.
- [Storylines](/storylines): Recent results with auto-detected upsets, goal fests and streaks.
- [Sponsor Lens](/sponsors): Re-view the season through a sponsor's eyes, ranked by Hospitality Score.
- [How scoring works](/about): Breakdown of the Content Score components and weights.
